item.title: Groovy Live Templates - Thu Apr 30 09:34:52 UTC 2026
item.description:
Adds support for Groovy in IDE live templates.
vendor: JetBrains s.r.o. downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: org.intellij.groovy.live.templates
